ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code representing the region (e.g., EU, UK, US) */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code for localized content */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "country_codes" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of country codes that belong to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Code representing the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L) */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for the size (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the size (e.g., Adult, Child, Infant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "converted_size" TEXT /* Converted size value in the region */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand (if brand-specific) */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_code" TEXT /* Code representing the measurement type (e.g., Bust, Waist) */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the measurement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size measurement */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement type */,
  "measurement_value" TEXT /* Measurement value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, in) */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand (if brand-specific) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the measurement (e.g., Adult, Child, Infant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's website */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for the product (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the product (e.g., Adult, Child, Infant) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the product */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is featured */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size in stock */,
  "is_out_of_stock" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size is out of stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the stock was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for the user */,
  "preferred_region" TEXT /* Preferred region for size conversions */,
  "preferred_brand" TEXT /* Preferred brand */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* Preferred size */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_subscribed_to_newsletter" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_preferred_region FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_region") REFERENCES regions ("region_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_preferred_brand FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_brand") REFERENCES brands ("brand_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_preferred_size FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size") REFERENCES sizes ("size_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user measurement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement type */,
  "measurement_value" TEXT /* Measurement value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, in) */,
  "date_measured" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the user's default measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_measurements_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_measurements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_saved_sizes" (
  "saved_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each saved size */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "date_saved" TEXT /* Date when the size was saved */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the user's default saved size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("saved_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_saved_sizes_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_saved_sizes_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_saved_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_saved_sizes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "preference_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the user's preference level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query entered by the user */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the search */,
  "search_results_count" INTEGER /* Number of search results returned */,
  "search_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the search in seconds */,
  "search_result_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of product IDs returned in the search results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)
